_schema.note: Delete this _schema key when the first real project lands. It's here as documentation for the shape a project entry should take.

fields.title: Human-readable project name
fields.status: one of: planning | active | wrapping-up | archived
fields.summary: Longer paragraph describing scope, methods, expected contribution
fields.themeIds: array of theme IDs from themes.json (e.g. ['multilingual','integrity'])
fields.grantIds: array of grant IDs from grants.json that fund this project
fields.outputIds: array of publication IDs from publications.json produced by this project
fields.collaboratorNames: free-text list of external collaborators for this specific project
